ai_assistance: AI-assisted implementation was used to draft this runner and cards; result statuses come from deterministic runner gates and manual review.
allowed_claim_sentence: Under fixed v0.27.0 sources, RAG/plain-text chunks are a boundary case and are not automatically covered by the 60-95% headline.
baseline_control_summary: Fixed v0.27.0 limitations source was checked for RAG passthrough language.
claim_boundary: This card records a limitation boundary, not a runtime benchmark. It does not prove that all RAG/plain-text inputs are unchanged or that no specific deployment can compress them.
known_limitations: No external RAG pipeline was run.
Does not cover future Headroom versions.
manual_review: The operator reviewed sanitized source-probe booleans for the limitation.
official_source_name: Headroom v0.27.0 public repository and package
raw_payload_manifest: No raw prompts, full fixtures, private transcripts, credentials, serial number, hardware UUID or provisioning UDID committed; only sanitized hash/count summaries are public.
source_rights_note: Headroom public repository is Apache-2.0; runtime fixtures are synthetic and generated locally; no private payloads committed.
